figures.title: Association Between HCW Vaccine Mandates and COVID-19 Mortality
figures.description: Forest plot showing adjusted mean difference in COVID-19 mortality rate (per 100,000) between states with and without HCW vaccine mandates, adjusted for region and population.

figures.title: COVID-19 Mortality Rates by Mandate Status and Census Region
figures.description: Grouped bar chart comparing COVID-19 mortality rates (per 100,000) across US Census regions, stratified by HCW vaccine mandate status.

tables.title: Baseline Characteristics of US States, by HCW Vaccine Mandate Status (July-October 2021)
tables.description: Baseline characteristics of 52 US states/territories stratified by HCW vaccine mandate status, including population, COVID-19 mortality and case rates, and regional distribution.

tables.title: Association Between HCW Vaccine Mandates and COVID-19 Mortality Rates (July-October 2021)
tables.description: Linear regression models showing the association between HCW vaccine mandates and COVID-19 mortality rates, with progressive adjustment for covariates.
